name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.alicuota_iva` has an RLS policy `Permitir gestión completa a usuarios autenticados` for `ALL` that allows unrestricted access (both USING and WITH CHECK are always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for authenticated.

metadata.name: alicuota_iva
metadata.policy_name: Permitir gestión completa a usuarios autenticados

name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.arca_access_tickets` has an RLS policy `Permitir select/insert/update de tickets a anon y authenticated` for `ALL` that allows unrestricted access (both USING and WITH CHECK are always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for anon, authenticated.

metadata.name: arca_access_tickets
metadata.policy_name: Permitir select/insert/update de tickets a anon y authenticated

name: anon_security_definer_function_executable
title: Public Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
description: Detects `SECURITY DEFINER` functions that are callable without signing in. Revoke `EXECUTE`, switch the function to `SECURITY INVOKER`, or move it out of your exposed API schema if it is not meant to be public.
detail: Function `public.crear_asiento_venta(p_tx_id text, p_concepto text, p_cuenta_activo text, p_total numeric, p_revenue numeric, p_iva numeric, p_es_fiscal boolean)` can be executed by the `anon` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/crear_asiento_venta`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

name: auth_leaked_password_protection
title: Leaked Password Protection Disabled
description: Leaked password protection is currently disabled.
detail: Supabase Auth prevents the use of compromised passwords by checking against HaveIBeenPwned.org. Enable this feature to enhance security.
